message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.broadcast_shapes passthrough wrapper (br-franken_numpy-4gxm)

Expose fnp_python.broadcast_shapes delegating to numpy.broadcast_shapes(*args).
The Rust fn is renamed py_broadcast_shapes with #[pyo3(name = "broadcast_shapes")]
to avoid collision with fnp_ndarray::broadcast_shapes imported at the top of the
module. Parity oracle test covers:
- pairwise shape broadcast (3,1) vs (1,4)
- 3-ary mixed-rank broadcast (1,) (5,1) (1,1,4)
- zero-arg success/error surface parity with numpy
- single empty-shape () passthrough
- large rank alignment across ranks 1, 3, 5
- incompatible-shape ValueError type surface
